# Senhorio

> The all-in-one rental management platform for Portuguese landlords — track rents, issue receipts, calculate taxes, stay compliant.

## What we do
Senhorio helps Portuguese landlords managing rental properties with Automates rent tracking, receipt generation, and tax compliance for Portuguese landlords.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://senhorio.vercel.app
- Pricing: https://senhorio.vercel.app/pricing
- Blog: https://senhorio.vercel.app/blog

## Contact
- Website: https://senhorio.vercel.app
